hero.title: PREDICT THE FUTURE
hero.subtitle: EARN GUAP
hero.description: Trade YES or NO on African events. Politics, sports, business. Powered by mobile money.

howItWorks.title: Up and trading in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No bank account, no ID upload, no waiting. Just Mobile Money.

step1.title: Create a free account
step1.desc: Sign up with just your email and pick a username. Your nTZS smart wallet is created automatically in seconds.

step2.title: Deposit via Mobile Money
step2.desc: Enter any amount above 1,000 TZS and your mobile money number. You'll get an STK push to complete the payment.

step3.title: Pick your markets
step3.desc: Browse open markets, research the odds, then buy YES or NO shares. Sell anytime. Get paid when you're right.

features.title: Built for serious predictors
features.subtitle: Every feature designed to give you an edge in African prediction markets.
features.builtForAfricaDesc: All markets priced in local currencies, starting with Tanzanian Shillings. Built for African events — politics, football, business, entertainment and beyond.
features.mobileMoneyDesc: Deposit and withdraw instantly with Mobile Money networks like MTN, Airtel Money, Vodacom, and others across Africa. No bank account needed.
features.nonCustodialDesc: Your TZS lives in your nTZS smart wallet on Base. GUAP never holds your funds — you're always in control.
features.instantPayoutsDesc: Markets resolve on-chain the moment outcomes are confirmed. Winnings are sent to your wallet automatically.
features.ammPriceDiscoveryDesc: Our Automated Market Maker ensures you can always buy or sell. Market prices reflect the true probability a crowd believes.
features.sharpPredictionsDesc: Research your markets, study volume trends, and make informed trades. Information is your edge — use it.

testimonials.title: Africa loves GUAP
testimonials.subtitle: Real traders, real earnings, real stories.
testimonials.quote1: Made 50,000 TZS on the Simba vs Yanga derby. GUAP is genuinely the best thing to happen to sports fans across East Africa.
testimonials.quote2: Depositing with Mobile Money took literally 30 seconds. Never thought I'd be trading predictions with my phone this easily in Africa.
testimonials.quote3: Finally a platform built for Africa. No USD headaches, no crypto complexity. Just predict, earn, and withdraw via mobile money.

mission.description: GUAP is Africa's prediction market — built to work with local currencies, mobile money, and the events Africans actually care about. We're launching in Tanzania with TZS and Mobile Money, then expanding across the continent. No USD conversion. No foreign complexity. Just local knowledge turned into earnings.
mission.point1: Launching in Tanzania — expanding across all of Africa
mission.point2: Deposit and withdraw with Mobile Money networks (MTN, Airtel, Vodacom & more)
mission.point3: Trade on African politics, football, business & entertainment
mission.point4: Non-custodial wallets secured by Base blockchain

cta.subtitle: Join 12,000+ traders across Africa already trading on GUAP. Create your account in under 60 seconds — completely free.

footer.description: Africa's first prediction market. Trade on local events starting in Tanzania.

createMarket.title: Create a Market
createMarket.subtitle: Ask a yes/no question about anything happening in the world.
createMarket.feeDescription: A one-time fee is deducted from your wallet balance when you create a market.
createMarket.question: Market Question
createMarket.resolutionDateHint: When this market will be resolved and winners paid out.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Manage your nTZS balance
wallet.depositDescription: Add TZS via Mobile Money (Vodacom, Tigo, Airtel). Tokens are minted to your wallet.
wallet.withdrawDescription: Withdraw your nTZS to Mobile Money. Tokens are burned and TZS is sent to your phone.
wallet.sendDescription: Send nTZS to another GUAP user.
wallet.signInToView: Sign in to view your wallet
wallet.depositSuccess: Mobile Money request sent! Complete the payment on your phone. Status will update automatically.
wallet.withdrawSuccess: Withdrawal initiated. Funds will arrive via Mobile Money shortly.
